---
title: "Methodology"
---

## Approach

Pull the high-level approach from your `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s
`vertical.dissertation.thesis.methodology.approach` field
(quantitative / qualitative / mixed-methods / computational) and elaborate.

## Data

Describe your data source(s). If you're using restricted data subject to a
DUA, note that here + record details in `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s
`vertical.dissertation.compliance.dua`.

## Analysis

Describe the analytic techniques. If quantitative or computational, R code
in the parent package's `R/` directory can be referenced here via embedded
chunks:

```{{r}}
#| echo: true
# Example: load the package + show its info
# library(yourpkg)
# package_info()
```

## Ethical considerations

If your work required IRB approval, note the approval number here + record
details in `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s `vertical.dissertation.compliance.irb`.
The number typically appears on the dissertation's title page at many
institutions.

## Limitations

What are the methodological limits of this approach? Be honest. Committees
appreciate candor about scope.
